title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Bosch India Software - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Bosch India Software - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Bosch India Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Bosch India Software:
Bosch India Software is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software!
